title: More Armors++ by Anoosh
description: More Armors++ by Anoosh adds new armor sets crafted from over 20 different materials, including common items like dirt and leaves, and unique ones like ender pearls and enchanted golden apples. This mod gives you new and creative ways to protect yourself
body:
More Armors++ By Anoosh
Welcome to More Armors++, a mod that I, Anoosh, created to expand the variety of armors available in Minecraft. This mod introduces new armor sets crafted from a wide range of materials, including apples, dirt, obsidian, and even enchanted golden apples. My goal was to add more creative and fun options for players to explore in their survival worlds. I hope these new armor sets make your Minecraft journey more exciting and give you more ways to express your style!

What's Included:

Apple Armor: A simple armor set made from apples. It's a great early-game option, especially if you have a surplus of apples from your farms.

![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c7e7d714130f51a964cea2019b121c4752aa255.png)

Bone Armor: This armor is a basic but reliable option, crafted from bones. It offers a little more protection than leather and is a good use for all those bones you get from skeletons.

![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d477a2fda1db7702bff29e8f3642b646f249c4b.png)

Carrot Armor: A unique and quirky armor set made from carrots. It provides a decent level of protection for an early-game item.

![c](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d92178a5be9b14985da40682d80349917d1f8e53.png)

Dirt Armor: Yes, you can now craft armor from dirt! This is the weakest armor in the mod, but it's a fun novelty item or a last-resort option when you have no other materials.

![d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bc15036d271bc590003e05613fe84ea3689dc81.png)

Enchanted Golden Apple Armor: The ultimate armor set in this mod. Crafted from enchanted golden apples, it offers the highest level of protection and durability, making you nearly invincible.

![e2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81ff7a89f89a444acb1229cdd8bfea960e55232c.png)

Ender Pearl Armor: A new armor set made from ender pearls. It offers excellent protection and a unique look, perfect for players who frequent the End.

![e3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6665fb9071cb86a0ad1d22c27a462a284fff5e96.png)

Golden Apple Armor: A strong armor set crafted from golden apples. It offers great protection and is a fantastic choice for players looking for an upgrade without using diamonds.

![g](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/887ff59313f8fb8850694d07f6ba2a8c882d244a.png)

Grass Armor: Similar to dirt armor, this set is weak but very accessible. It's a simple, novelty option if you find yourself with lots of grass blocks.

![g](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f1c2ff5382c111dbb18cef88141135a81d587e9.png)

Leaf Armor: A simple armor set made from leaves. It provides basic protection and is great for using up excess leaves from tree farms.

![l](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3667d90532ed541518617b8d2c97313cf4e7abd8.png)

Log Armor: A new and simple armor set crafted from logs. It's a slight step up from wooden armor, offering a solid early-game option.

![l](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a01ecf3b0b9047fd88704e10896db6cc04b6072e.png)

Magma Armor: This armor is crafted from magma blocks. It has a unique fiery appearance and offers good protection, making it a great option for those who explore the Nether.

![m](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3025db9b5b5fe64e33a4399aca0373b82b8ec74f.png)

Moss Armor: A simple armor set made from moss blocks. It's a bit more durable than dirt armor and is a good option for early-game use in lush caves or biomes.

![m](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0fab622003399a4062ef9640a6f1531c323d958.png)

Obsidian Armor: As strong as diamond armor but with much more durability, obsidian armor is a great way to use your obsidian. It provides excellent protection for your adventures.

![o](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/337078cead3ba627b4321b3cc8e67016941a5ddc.png)

Plank Armor: A more basic armor set crafted from planks. It's a good alternative to regular wooden armor.

![p](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f8a2c74406a69ea20fa7c8913519fe0762a7438.png)

Sand Armor: Similar to dirt and grass armor, this set is very weak but accessible. It's a fun way to use up a lot of sand if you have it.

![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4a1431260772ddfcd7a90416f69e30fd3b6e1c0.png)

Slime Armor: This unique armor set is crafted from slime balls. It has a fun, bouncy feel and offers a good balance of protection and durability.

![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b03cc7e9fd58cf34ad36cd59dcacdbd3ebbec8d.png)

Stick Armor: A simple, novelty armor set made from sticks. It offers minimal protection but can be crafted with minimal resources.

![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3491bef46f04c44901ec08f487b6e5c7431db352.png)

Stone Armor: A slightly different recipe for stone armor. This mod's version provides a simple and straightforward way to get started with protection.

![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5347aa9eaa324800b445bcd2d4564635da504f04.png)

String Armor: A very unique armor set crafted from string. It offers some protection and is a good way to use up excess string.

![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cf54596314e2d22a5f80cb26f0a996eedac36db.png)

I'm always looking for feedback and new ideas. Feel free to leave a comment with your suggestions!
